examples: We can lose our ability to ship to a country if we falsify customs declarations.
Sincerity, expressed by human lips and enforced by eyes, is impossible to falsify.
Of course the whole science symbol is testing hypothesis and hoping someone would say to falsify them.
It is relatively easy to falsify the address from which a query was sent.
But what seems clear is that experiments to falsify the equivalence principle are going to be complicated.
